summary: Finalized the itharisen item translation unit by adding an ItemStateTable definition, changing a dropped-logic call from it_8026B390 to Item_8026849C, converting itharisen.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py, and changing several item-related .sdata/.sdata2 symbols from global address-style names to local labels.

key_files.role: Item source finalized with a new ItemStateTable it_803F5FF0 and a helper call replacement in itHarisen_Logic24_Dropped.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/itharisen.c changes it_8026B390(gobj) to Item_8026849C(gobj)
raw_diff: configure.py changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itharisen.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itharisen.c")

key_files.role: Symbol metadata adjusted for item-related .sdata string labels and .sdata2 float/double labels, changing several globals to local labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt changes it_804D5230 and it_804D5238 to @254 and @255 local string labels
raw_diff: symbols.txt changes it_804DC900 through it_804DC960 from global float/double symbols to local labels
raw_diff: symbols.txt changes it_804DCAF8 and it_804DCAFC to local labels

what_changed: Added ItemStateTable it_803F5FF0 with ten entries referencing itHarisen_UnkMotion0/1/6/7/8/9 animation, physics, and collision callbacks.
Changed itHarisen_Logic24_Dropped to call Item_8026849C(gobj) instead of it_8026B390(gobj) before Item_80268E5C(gobj, 8, 6).
Marked melee/it/items/itharisen.c as Matching in configure.py.

Converted multiple symbols.txt entries in .sdata and .sdata2 from global it_804Dxxxx names to local @-number labels while preserving addresses, sizes, sections, alignment, and data kinds shown in the diff.

smart_moves.text: The PR pairs the configure.py Matching flip with source and symbol metadata changes, rather than only changing the build classification.
The added ItemStateTable keeps item state dispatch data in the item source file instead of leaving the table absent from itharisen.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ItemStateTable it_803F5FF0[] added near top of itharisen.c

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item object finalization, matching can involve both source recovery and symbol metadata cleanup: here the item source gained its state table while symbols.txt changed nearby literal/float labels from globals to locals.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt changes global it_804D5230/it_804D5238 and it_804DC900-it_804DC960 entries to local labels

decomp_lessons.lesson: A final matching flip in configure.py should be read alongside the concrete source and metadata diff; this PR provides the flip but no PR-body or comment explanation of verifier output.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py changes itharisen.c NonMatching to Matching
metadata_json: review_comments and issue_comments counts are 0

naming_conventions.convention: The source uses item-local Harisen callback names such as itHarisen_UnkMotion0_Anim, itHarisen_UnkMotion6_Phys, and itHarisen_UnkMotion9_Coll in the ItemStateTable.
The PR replaces several address-style global data symbols with local @number labels in symbols.txt when the diff represents them as local string, float, or double data.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Recover the item state table as a real ItemStateTable array in source, with NULL collision callbacks for entries that have no collision function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ItemStateTable it_803F5FF0[] added with NULL fields for several UnkMotion6 entries

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use the established Item_8026849C helper call instead of the lower-level it_8026B390 call at the dropped logic site.
Adjust symbols.txt local/global scope metadata for literals and floating constants when finalizing the item object.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: .sdata and .sdata2 global-to-local label changes in config/GALE01/symbols.txt

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching src/melee/it/items/itharisen.c or it_803F5FF0 for naming cleanup beyond UnkMotion labels.
Search for other item finalization PRs that add ItemStateTable arrays and flip configure.py from NonMatching to Matching.
Search symbols.txt history for it_804DC900 through it_804DC960 to see whether local label ownership was stable after this PR.
Search for Item_8026849C call replacements of it_8026B390 in other item files.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR 2205 title, author, state, timestamps, changed file counts
raw_diff: full diff available and not truncated
notes: The diff is complete and directly supports the changed-file and code/metadata summaries.
There are no review comments, issue comments, or PR body details explaining author intent, verifier commands, objdiff output, or reviewer rationale.
The PR title and configure.py diff support that itharisen.c was marked Matching, but the slice does not include independent build, objdiff, or regression logs.
Symbol ownership conclusions should remain cautious: the diff shows global-to-local label changes, but not the underlying symbol-discovery rationale.

accepted_candidate_records.title: itharisen matching finalization combined source table recovery with symbol metadata cleanup

rejection_notes: Do not record reviewer intent or requested changes; the slice has no reviews or comments.
Do not claim objdiff/build/checkdiff validation beyond the configure.py Matching flip and PR title; no verifier logs are present.
Do not infer semantic meanings for itHarisen_UnkMotion* callbacks; the PR keeps UnkMotion names.
Do not promote a broad standard that all item finalizations require global-to-local symbol changes; this PR only shows that such changes occurred here.
